item.name: Archmatron Angelfish
item.description:
This majestic freshwater fish is commonly found in the still waters of Iq Rrax Tsoly.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: With its majestic winglike fins and muted coloration, this wavekin has an almost ethereal presence. While similar species are found across the world, this specimen in particular has persisted unchanged for eons.
